reviews.comment:
Cada vez dista más de una buena atencion,soy socio pensando en darme de baja ayer no funcionaba el servicio o sea que carge pero no quedo registrado,en gral está lejos de una atención de excelencia como tiempo a atrás.

(Translated by Google)
It's becoming increasingly less of a good service. I'm a member and I'm thinking of canceling my membership. Yesterday, the service wasn't working, so I loaded it but it wasn't registered. Overall, it's far from the excellent service it was in the past.

reviews.comment:
La atención del personal en la cafetería excelente, los precios del kiosco carísimos, a mí entender deberían modernizar el interior parece un comedor de fábrica, no llama a volver .... Saludos

(Translated by Google)
The staff in the cafeteria were excellent, but the kiosk prices were outrageous. In my opinion, they should modernize the interior; it looks like a factory cafeteria and doesn't make you want to return. Regards
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16851497882005814309/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNvMC1tSVhnEAE

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención...!!! Lugar muy prolijo y limpio...!!! Amplia playa de expendio de combustible. La cafetería muy buena con gran surtido en el kiosko. Sanitarios muy limpios y ordenados. El personal muy amable... Recomiendo esta estación de servicio...!!!

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service! Very neat and clean! Spacious fuel pumps. The cafeteria is very good with a great selection at the kiosk. Very clean and tidy restrooms. Very friendly staff. I highly recommend this gas station!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16851497882005814309/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNvN2YzblNREAE
